arts.ttl: Team News: New captain for Palace with Guéhi out
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have made just one enforced change to their starting XI for the visit of Southampton on Sunday afternoon, with one player wearing the captain’s armband for the first time.

arts.ttl: Liverpool learn Marc Guehi transfer decision as Crystal Palace eye move for Reds attacker?
arts.sum: Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi is reportedly favouring a move to Liverpool above all other potential transfers ahead of the January window.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Southampton now want to sign £8.4m player for Ivan Juric in January with Ipswich also keen
Marc Guehi 'wants to join Liverpool and is willing to wait to get his move' with his contract ticking down - as Crystal Palace 'eye up Reds wonderkid as part of deal'
arts.sum: This season Guehi has captained a struggling Palace side, playing 22 games in all competitions and remaining one of the stand-out performers for Oliver Glasner's men.

arts.ttl: “They should’ve sacked him sooner” – Southampton old boy thinks club is doomed, been run into ground
arts.sum: Southampton currently find themselves rooted to the bottom of the Premier League table with just six points from the 18 matches they’ve played so far this season.
